'''Garrik Trier''' was an [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

==Biography==
He commanded the [[Brak Sector Fleet|fleet]] stationed in the [[Brak sector/Legends|Brak sector]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Trier was known as a confident commander, who spent a great deal of time analyzing naval tactics used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Garrik's last name is also the name of a [[Wikipedia:Trier|city]] in Germany.
